name: Marketplace PZ - BUSCAR TODOS OS PAGAMENTOS

parameters.query:
SELECT *, count(*) OVER() AS total_count
FROM payments
WHERE 
    -- Busca Global (Search)
    ($1::text IS NULL OR $1 = 'null' OR username ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' OR email ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%' OR transaction_id::text ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%')
    
    -- Filtro de Status
    AND ($2::text IS NULL OR $2 = 'null' OR status = $2)
    
    -- Filtro de Data (Ajustado para não dar erro de syntax)
    AND ($3::text IS NULL OR $3 = 'null' OR created_at::date = NULLIF($3, 'null')::date)

ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT $4
OFFSET $5;
